title: sphaerostephanos spenceri
intro: Sphaerostephanos spenceri is a species of fern in the family Dryniaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits associated with Sphaerostephanos spenceri include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal and health benefits.
